prompt: A high-energy vertical social media poster bursting with motion and excitement, a cool 3D cartoon character — a young athletic girl with a blonde ponytail wearing a neon yellow sports jacket white leggings and chunky white sneakers, captured mid-air in a powerful jumping pose with one fist punching upward toward the sky, her expression fierce and determined with oversized stylized eyes full of fire, surrounding her an explosion of giant 3D inflatable objects in vivid colors — oversized lightning bolt shapes in electric yellow, large glossy spheres in hot pink and cobalt blue, floating star bursts and speed lines radiating outward from her body suggesting explosive movement, the background a bold gradient from deep purple at the top to vibrant coral orange at the bottom, {argument name="main typography" default="bold ultra-heavy condensed white typography at the top reading \"NO LIMITS\""} in massive letters with a subtle neon yellow drop shadow, smaller punchy subtitle below "Push harder · Go further · Never stop", tiny decorative spark and flame symbols scattered across the composition, premium sports brand 3D illustration quality, 9:16 vertical ratio
